description: Improvement proposals with scoring and validation status

entries.problem: Auto-fix ruff issues across src/ and tests/
entries.evidence: Ruff check returned exit code 1 with E501/F841 errors

entries.problem: Fix subagent model name format across .opencode/agents/*.md
entries.expected_benefit: Subagent delegation works without 'Model not found' errors
entries.evidence: Opportunity O-003 — fixed all 5 subagent configs

what_was_accomplished: T-019: Notebook block CRUD backend + frontend
Frontend: experiments, notebooks, search, project UI all built
what_was_learned: block_contents table was not in migration — had to create a new migration
JSONB type requires sa.dialects.postgresql prefix in Alembic
shadcn components must be individually installed
what_can_improve: Add pre-flight check for database schema before writing endpoints
Consolidate shadcn component installation into a setup script
